message:
chore(engine): concurrent agent refinements — test fixes + wasm lane enrichment

Concurrent agent updates:

- execution_orchestrator.rs: minor test assertion refinements
- mmr_proof.rs: test value corrections for boundary conditions
- policy_checkpoint.rs: expanded test assertions and edge case handling
- wasm_runtime_lane.rs (+223): comprehensive test enrichment covering
  WASM lane configuration, execution boundaries, and serde roundtrips

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
